title: How to host my website for cheap?
abstract:
Hi all,

I just got hands on a domain for my name that I've been looking for quite some time now.

I want to start pointing it to something.

I started looking for options, but there are so many junk articles and I think my knowledge is a bit outdated.

I am a developer with around 10+ YOE.
abstract_zh:
Hi all,

I just got hands on a domain for my name that I've been looking for quite some time now.

I am a developer with around 10+ YOE.
